title: Housing.com is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Housing.com is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Senior Property Advisor looking for your next big career move? Housing.com in Madurai offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Housing.com:
Housing.com is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Source and close property deals with prospective buyers and investors
• Manage RERA documentation and compliance requirements
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Property Management
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Annual performance appraisal
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Madurai, Tamil Nadu, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Housing.com!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
